overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing the player entering a dimly lit industrial backroom through a door marked 'NO ENTRY', interacting with an NPC to loot Eurodollars and a shard from a computer terminal, and then exploring the neon-lit corridor after the NPC exits. The environment features concrete walls, cyberpunk posters, and green neon lighting.

events.description: passing through the NO ENTRY doorway from exterior into the dimly lit interior corridor
slowing down while approaching the NPC standing at the computer terminal

agents.ego_description: walking through the metal doorway into the narrow concrete corridor, approaching an NPC standing by a computer desk

notable_agents.action: standing at the computer terminal facing the wall, wearing tactical gear with blue hair

entered.detail: metal door frame with yellow NO ENTRY sign above and concrete threshold
large vertical posters on the concrete wall including one for CHROMATIC CARNAGE
long red table with mechanical equipment and a small robot device underneath
metal desk with glowing computer terminal and keyboard
vertical industrial pipes running along the concrete wall

segments.scene_description: The player enters a narrow industrial backroom through a doorway marked NO ENTRY. The concrete corridor is dimly lit with green neon accents, featuring cyberpunk posters on the left wall and a red workbench. An NPC with blue hair stands at a computer terminal in the corner as the player approaches.

events.description: activating the loot interface to collect items from the computer terminal
taking Eurodollars and the Chromatic Carnage shard from the desk, indicated by green holographic glow
NPC finishes interaction and turns to walk toward the exit door

agents.ego_description: standing at the computer terminal examining and collecting loot items including Eurodollars and a shard

notable_agents.action: standing at the computer terminal, then turning and walking away toward the exit after the looting is complete

entered.detail: floating holographic interface displaying CHROMATIC CARNAGE and EURODOLLARS 350 with take/drink options

segments.scene_description: The player stands at the computer terminal interacting with the loot system. A holographic UI appears showing items to collect including Eurodollars and a Chromatic Carnage shard. The NPC stands nearby initially, then turns and walks toward the exit door at the end of the interaction.

events.description: NPC exits through the doorway leaving the player alone in the corridor
camera moves deeper into the corridor toward the green exit door at the far end
camera pans upward to show ceiling pipes and lighting fixtures before turning back

agents.ego_description: walking through the empty corridor examining the workbench items, posters, and environment after the NPC departs

entered.detail: green metal door with yellow markings at the far end of the corridor
cardboard box, electronic tablets, and mechanical parts scattered on the red table
exposed industrial piping and fluorescent light fixtures on the ceiling

segments.scene_description: After the NPC exits through the doorway, the player explores the empty corridor alone. The camera moves past the red workbench toward a green exit door at the far end, examining scattered items including a cardboard box and electronic tablets. The player then pans upward to view the industrial ceiling pipes before turning back toward the entrance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from the entry of a restricted industrial backroom into a solitary exploration of its neon-lit interior. It begins by passing through a doorway marked NO ENTRY into a dim concrete corridor accented with green neon and cyberpunk posters, moving toward a blue-haired NPC stationed at a computer terminal. As the camera reaches the terminal, a holographic UI appears to facilitate the looting of Eurodollars and a shard, after which the NPC turns and departs through the far exit. The scene then shifts to a lonely survey of the empty space, gliding past a red workbench and scattered electronic tablets toward a green door. Finally, the camera pans upward to examine the industrial ceiling pipes before turning back toward the original entrance.
